description: Octave is a generative GTM platform that turns your ICP and positioning into live, context-aware messaging, helping teams research accounts and personalize outreach.
overview: Octave helps go-to-market teams research accounts, qualify leads, and generate tailored messaging in real time, turning static ICP and positioning docs into a live engine.
what_is: Octave is a generative GTM tool for sharper outbound. It helps teams research leads, qualify accounts, and produce tailored messaging on the fly, turning static ICP and positioning documents into a live, context-aware engine that powers personalized campaigns.

It is strongest at creating precise messaging, aligning teams on positioning, and quickly producing updated GTM playbooks. Because it generates from your own context, useful output appears within minutes of setup.
Octave integrates with CRMs, email sequencers, and orchestration tools through APIs to fit the stack. It is not a CRM or a basic marketing tool; it focuses on dynamic outbound strategy and messaging.
